subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the Merciful! Praise be to God, ye are cherished handmaids at the threshold of His oneness and before His sacred court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء رحمن الحمد لله درگاه احدیت را کنیزان عزیزانید و آستان مقدس را
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @high station of the true believer
